name: Authority Labs LLC
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Small Business
description:
What Authority Labs Does?

Authority Labs rank tracking tool aims to empower SEO professionals with the necessary tools and insights to optimize their strategies effectively and achieve better search engine visibility.

‍

Source: GetApp

‍

Features

➡️ Helps monitor your SEO performance with reliable and accurate keyword data

➡️ Helps automate local rank tracking and mobile rank tracking with daily reporting 

➡️ Enables Global tracking by adding domains or pages from any country or language supported by Google, Bing and Yahoo

➡️ Tracks mobile ranking and the keywords mobile users are using with device-specific data.

➡️ Digs into granular and local data available by state, city and postal code

Benefits

⭐️ Offers 100% white label dashboards

⭐️ Helps track competitors domain easily and gain a competitve edge

⭐️ Allows unlimited user accounts to log in for reporting dashboards at no additional cost

⭐️ Helps blend your Rank Tracker data with other data sources like Google Search Console, Google Ads, and more.

⭐️ Recover unprovided organic keywords.

Pros

✅ Its a good and a simple tool to start off with for ank tracking, especially for someone who's new to this

Cons

❌ Offers a steep price and customers often find it overpriced
❌ The user interface and the style is out of date and needs to be worked upon

Priced at $99.99 Per Month
